profile.headline: Aspiring Data Scientist & ML Engineer / Junior Software Developer (Backend)
profile.availability: Available for new freelance projects and open to opportunities
profile.summary: Builds custom AI systems, data pipelines, and scalable backend APIs. Focus areas include computer vision, machine learning, RAG/LLM systems, and cloud data engineering with Microsoft Fabric and AWS.

experience.title: Junior Software Developer (Backend)
experience.description: Designing and building scalable REST APIs and backend services using Node.js, Express, TypeScript, and PostgreSQL on AWS Cloud for smart logistics and delivery management platforms.

education.degree: Bachelor of Technology in Data Science
education.school: R. C. Patel Institute of Technology

education.degree: Diploma in Computer Science and Engineering

credentials.name: Microsoft Certified: Fabric Data Engineer Associate (DP-700)

services.pitch: Custom AI systems and data pipelines that solve real business problems - from predictive analytics to intelligent agents.

capabilities.title: Artificial Intelligence
capabilities.subtitle: Neural Networks & LLMs
capabilities.description: Deploying Large Language Models and custom neural architectures for complex reasoning tasks.

capabilities.title: Data Science
capabilities.subtitle: Analytics & Pipelines
capabilities.description: Transforming raw data into structured, actionable intelligence through automated ETL and visualization.

pricing.name: Prototype / Research
pricing.desc: Proof of concept, college projects, and initial data exploration.

pricing.name: Production / MVP
pricing.desc: Full-stack applications with integrated AI and robust backends.

pricing.name: Enterprise / Scale
pricing.desc: Complex architectures, RAG systems, and custom agents.

process.title: Requirement Injection
process.desc: Analysis of project constraints, data sources, and desired outputs.

process.title: Architecture Design
process.desc: Drafting the blueprint: model selection, pipeline design, and tech stack.

process.title: Development Cycle
process.desc: Iterative coding of the core logic, model training, and integration.

process.title: System Deployment
process.desc: Production rollout, load testing, and final handshake.

booking.howToBook: Visit /services to review offerings, then use the service inquiry form on /services or the contact form on /contact. Email contact.himanshusalunke@gmail.com to start.

payment.advance: 50% advance required to book a slot and begin architecture
notes: Client pays cloud hosting and third-party API costs (AWS/GCP, OpenAI, etc.)
Client receives 100% IP rights and full source code after final payment
14 days of post-delivery support for bug fixes and minor tweaks
